content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the in-scope branch delta in `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` and `tests/unit/process_backend_test.rs` (excluding `.ralph-burning/` per instructions). I verified the command-construction paths for Codex vs. OpenRouter, checked local `codex exec --help`/config parsing behavior, and ran the targeted fast-suffix tests. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues that warrant an amendment.

## Amendments

None.
